storeInfo.name: Zanish Clothing
storeInfo.heroQuote: Curating premium fashion for your everyday elegance.
storeInfo.heroSubquote: A perfect blend of modern style and timeless comfort for Gents, Ladies, and Kids.

products.name: Premium Cotton Linen Shirt
products.description: Ultra-breathable premium cotton linen blend shirt. Perfect for semi-formal and casual wear.

products.name: Tailored Fit Comfort Chinos
products.description: Smart casual chinos crafted from soft, stretchable cotton twill. Designed for all-day comfort.

products.name: Classic Lightweight Summer Blazer
products.description: Unstructured linen-blend blazer that adds a touch of sophistication to any casual outfit.

products.name: Elegant Pastel Floral Midi Dress
products.description: Graceful flowy midi dress with delicate floral prints and an adjustable waist belt.

products.name: Chic Linen Co-Ord Set
products.description: A stylish matching top and trousers set in a soft beige hue. Effortless styling for modern women.

products.name: Satin Silk Wrap Blouse
products.description: Premium satin wrap blouse with elegant balloon sleeves. Perfect for evenings and formal events.

products.name: Unisex Cotton Denim Overalls
products.description: Durable, soft denim overalls with adjustable straps. Perfect for active and playful kids.

products.name: Organic Cotton Tee & Shorts Set
products.description: Breathable organic cotton set consisting of a graphic tee and comfy drawstring shorts.

products.name: Cozy Knit Crewneck Sweater
products.description: Super soft knit cotton sweater to keep your little ones warm and cozy throughout the day.
